# Lumina Digitale
> Full AI-readable map of Lumina Digitale pages, services, tools, and educational resources.

## Brand Structure
- [Lumina Danismanlik](https://luminadigitale.com/): Main consulting landing page.
- [Lumina Siber](https://luminadigitale.com/siber.html): Cyber risk and digital trust branch.
- [Lumina Akademi](https://luminadigitale.com/akademi.html): Education branch for Etsy, Shopify, and ad platforms.

## Core Company Pages
- [Services](https://luminadigitale.com/hizmetler.html): Service categories and engagement models.
- [Consulting Services](https://luminadigitale.com/danismanlik-hizmetleri.html): Detailed consulting offerings.
- [Policies](https://luminadigitale.com/politikalar.html): Policy and legal information.
- [Contact](https://luminadigitale.com/iletisim.html): Main contact and intake.

## Consulting and Training Services
- [Shopify Consulting](https://luminadigitale.com/shopify-danismanligi.html): Shopify setup and growth consulting.
- [Etsy Consulting](https://luminadigitale.com/etsy-danismanligi.html): Etsy listing and store optimization support.
- [Website Setup](https://luminadigitale.com/web-sitesi-kurulumu.html): Website setup and conversion-focused structure.
- [Social Media Management](https://luminadigitale.com/sosyal-medya-yonetimi.html): Content and social channel management.
- [Ads Mentorship](https://luminadigitale.com/reklam-yonetimi-mentor-destegi.html): Campaign mentoring and management.
- [Etsy Training](https://luminadigitale.com/etsy-egitimi.html): Training page for Etsy workflows.
- [Shopify Training](https://luminadigitale.com/shopify-egitimi.html): Training page for Shopify operations.
- [Meta and Google Ads Training](https://luminadigitale.com/meta-google-ads-egitimi.html): Paid media learning path.
- [Academy Programs](https://luminadigitale.com/akademi-egitimleri.html): Education listing hub.

## Free Tools and Checkups
- [Tools Hub](https://luminadigitale.com/araclar.html): All free tools directory.
- [SEO Technical Analysis](https://luminadigitale.com/seo-teknik-analiz.html): Technical SEO risk scoring.
- [Site Risk Analysis](https://luminadigitale.com/site-risk-analizi.html): Risk scan for suspicious patterns.
- [Link Check](https://luminadigitale.com/link-kontrolu.html): URL safety check utility.
- [Security Checkup](https://luminadigitale.com/guvenlik-checkup.html): Quick security health checks.
- [Password Tools](https://luminadigitale.com/parola-araclari.html): Password-related utilities.
- [ROAS Calculator](https://luminadigitale.com/roas-hesaplayici.html): Paid media profitability calculation.
- [Discount Calculator](https://luminadigitale.com/indirim-hesaplayici.html): Discount and reverse-price calculations.
- [Marketing Level Test](https://luminadigitale.com/dijital-pazarlama-seviye-testi.html): Self-assessment quiz for marketing maturity.
- [Etsy Product Analysis](https://luminadigitale.com/etsy-urun-analizi.html): Product-level analysis support.
- [Percentage Calculator](https://luminadigitale.com/yuzde-hesaplayici.html): Percent change and ratio calculator.
- [VAT Calculator](https://luminadigitale.com/kdv-hesaplayici.html): VAT math utility.
- [Margin Calculator](https://luminadigitale.com/kar-marji-hesaplayici.html): Margin and profitability utility.
- [Commission Calculator](https://luminadigitale.com/komisyon-hesaplayici.html): Marketplace commission utility.

## Content and Blog
- [Blog Hub](https://luminadigitale.com/blog.html): Editorial hub for security, e-commerce, and growth.
- [Cyber Risk Pillar](https://luminadigitale.com/blog-pillar-siber-risk-omurgasi.html): Pillar article for cyber-risk content.
- [E-commerce Setup Pillar](https://luminadigitale.com/blog-pillar-eticaret-kurulum-omurgasi.html): Pillar article for setup workflows.
- [Ads Learning Pillar](https://luminadigitale.com/blog-pillar-reklam-egitim-omurgasi.html): Pillar article for ads education.
- [Trusted Site Checklist](https://luminadigitale.com/blog-guvenilir-site-10-pratik-kontrol.html): Practical trust checks before transactions.
- [Scam Site Detection](https://luminadigitale.com/blog-dolandirici-site-nasil-anlasilir.html): Scam detection guide.
- [Safe Link Guide](https://luminadigitale.com/blog-link-guvenli-mi-nasil-anlarim.html): Link safety guide.
- [Etsy Store Setup Guide](https://luminadigitale.com/blog-etsy-magazasi-nasil-acilir.html): Etsy launch guide.
- [Shopify Store Setup Guide](https://luminadigitale.com/blog-shopify-magazasi-nasil-acilir.html): Shopify launch guide.
- [Shopify vs Etsy Guide](https://luminadigitale.com/blog-shopify-mi-etsy-mi.html): Platform comparison.
- [Meta Ads vs Google Ads Learning Path](https://luminadigitale.com/blog-meta-ads-google-ads-nasil-ogrenebilirim.html): Learning roadmap.
